seo.title: PDF tools - Merge, compress, split, and manage pages
seo.description: Browse PDFTool.work tools for upload preparation, compression, merging, splitting, page management, image conversion, rotation, and unlocking.

lead: Pick a tool for common PDF work and review practical browser limits before you submit important files.

strings.heroLead: Choose a tool by target size, page cleanup, format conversion, or page direction. Results can depend on browser memory, device performance, and PDF structure.
strings.indexTitle: PDF utilities for everyday document cleanup
strings.indexLead: These tools cover upload preparation, document merging, page splitting, scan cleanup, and common format conversion.
strings.uploadReadyText: Check size and readability before submitting applications, visa files, forms, or attachments.
strings.compressText: Try to reduce file size and keep a practical readability check in the workflow.
strings.mergeText: Combine several PDFs into one file for submission or archiving.
strings.splitText: Extract page ranges and remove material that does not need to be sent.
strings.manageText: Delete, reorder, and rotate pages in multi-page documents.
strings.pdfToJpgText: Export PDF pages as images for previews, screenshots, or lightweight sharing.
strings.jpgToPdfText: Collect photos, scans, or screenshots into a PDF document.
strings.rotateText: Fix sideways, upside-down, or scanned pages with the wrong orientation.
strings.unlockText: When you have permission and the password, try to remove opening restrictions from a local file.
strings.notesLead: Browser PDF utilities are useful for lightweight and temporary jobs. They do not replace professional layout, archival, or enterprise approval systems.
strings.noteLocalText: The PDF you choose is read by the current browser. The page may still load site assets, analytics, and advertising requests.
strings.noteLimitsText: Scanned PDFs, image-heavy files, encrypted documents, or complex internal structures may need more memory and may not process as expected.
strings.noteQualityText: Before submitting a result, reopen it and check page count, orientation, readability, and target-platform requirements.
